Notes: Attempt to delete the zone apex name with a single delete_name operation, then query apex SOA and NS to observe whether the server refuses the update or applies it and what remains at the origin.

Steps.Description: Delete the zone apex name campus.edu. using delete_name as the sole update operation.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA rrset remains after the update attempt.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex NS rrset remains after the update attempt.
